# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

function getPageRouter() {
    $default_page = 'home';
    $templates_dir = __DIR__ . '/templates/';
    $page_extension = '.php';
    
    $page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : $default_page;
    
    $page = basename($page);
    $page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '', $page);
    
    $template_file = $templates_dir . $page . $page_extension;
    
    if (file_exists($template_file)) {
        include $template_file;
    } else {
        $fallback_file = $templates_dir . $default_page . $page_extension;
        if (file_exists($fallback_file)) {
            include $fallback_file;
        } else {
            http_response_code(404);
            echo '<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>404 - Page Not Found</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>404 - Page Not Found</h1>
    <p>The requested page could not be found.</p>
</body>
</html>';
        }
    }
}

getPageRouter();

?>
